commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, and condemn the innocent blood. Augustine of Hippo 21. For what followeth. "They will be captious against the soul of the righteous "(ver. Why will they be captious. Because they can find no true ground of accusation. For how were they captious against our Lord. They made up false accusations, because they could not find true ones. "And will condemn the innocent blood. " Why all this taketh place, he will show in the sequel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
